narrative:
Precinct Toledo 6E (precinct in Lucas County) has 892 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.6 percentage points.
